allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); v=[s for s in d['streams'] if s['codec_type']=='video'][0]; print\(f\\"codec={v['codec_name']} res={v['width']}x{v['height']} fps={v.get\('r_frame_rate','?'\)} duration={v.get\('duration','?'\)}s bitrate={int\(v.get\('bit_rate',0\)\)//1000}kbps\\"\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); v=[s for s in d['streams'] if s['codec_type']=='video'][0]; print\(f\\"hero.mp4: codec={v['codec_name']} res={v['width']}x{v['height']} fps={v.get\('r_frame_rate','?'\)} duration={v.get\('duration','?'\)}s bitrate={int\(v.get\('bit_rate',0\)\)//1000}kbps\\"\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); v=[s for s in d['streams'] if s['codec_type']=='video'][0]; print\(f\\"hero_hq.mp4: codec={v['codec_name']} res={v['width']}x{v['height']} fps={v.get\('r_frame_rate','?'\)} duration={v.get\('duration','?'\)}s bitrate={int\(v.get\('bit_rate',0\)\)//1000}kbps\\"\)")
Bash(ffmpeg -y -i hero2.mp4 -vf scale=1920:-2 -c:v libx264 -crf 28 -preset slow -profile:v high -pix_fmt yuv420p -movflags +faststart -an hero2_hq.mp4)
Bash(ffmpeg -y -i hero2.mp4 -vf scale=960:-2 -c:v libx264 -crf 28 -preset slow -profile:v high -pix_fmt yuv420p -movflags +faststart -an hero2_mobile.mp4)
Bash(ffmpeg -y -i hero2.mp4 -vf scale=1920:-2 -c:v libvpx-vp9 -crf 35 -b:v 0 -deadline best -an hero2_hq.webm)
Bash(ffmpeg -y -i hero2.mp4 -vf scale=960:-2 -c:v libvpx-vp9 -crf 35 -b:v 0 -deadline best -an hero2_mobile.webm)
